name: Cranberry Cordial
recipeInstructions:
1 Coarsely chop the cranberries in a food processor fitted with the metal blade or chop with a knife.
2 Stir the cranberries and sugar in a large bowl until the berries are well coated.
3 Stir in the remaining ingredients until blended.
4 Pour the mixture into a large glass jar, cover, and store in a cool, dark place for at least 1 month. Stir or shake the jar every few days.
5 Before serving, strain the liquid from the cranberries through a fine strainer or dampened cheesecloth.
6 The cordial may be stored tightly covered at room temperature up to 3 months. Refrigerate it for longer storage.
7 Makes about 4 cups.
